scripts.deploy: git pull && npm i && npm run build && rm -rf /var/www/andrewmccall/dist/* && mv -f dist /var/www/andrewmccall
scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --release --manifest-path wasm/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && cp wasm/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/canvas_wasm.wasm public/canvas.wasm || echo 'build:wasm skipped (no rust wasm toolchain); using committed public/canvas.wasm'
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && tsc && vite build
